Description: Spot a prominent landmark or structure in the distance, hear the far-off sound of thunder signaling a coming storm
Spot a well-hidden object or feature, eavesdrop on a hushed conversation through a heavy door
Spot a nearly-invisible object or feature, read the lips of a creature you can see but not hear
Spot a creature attempting to hide, hear the movements of a hidden foe
Spot a natural-obscured object or feature, eavesdrop on a conversation in the next room
